mechanics.excerpt: SMG: The standard" SMG closely resembles large tol with an elongated magazine extending from its grip_ Rorynex RM-3/XXI SMG: Using slightly smaller bullet to increase its overall range_ Rorynex Industries- popular XXI is potent weapon_ Its high capacity magazine allows full-auto fire while explosive tipped bullets can shred most personal armors_ These qualities also make the Rorynex illegal on hun dreds of worlds across the Inner Sphere.
